logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Starting Jira sync script and setting up monitoring
logs.content:
{
    "thoughts": [
        "The user wants me to run a Jira script that may take 5-15 minutes.",
        "I need to execute the script in background mode and then monitor it periodically.",
        "The monitoring should happen up to 10 times with 30-second intervals between checks.",
        "Upon completion or failure, I need to send appropriate notifications.",
        "First, I'll run the script using code_execution_tool with output runtime to keep it running in background."
    ],
    "headline": "Starting Jira sync script and setting up monitoring",
    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",
    "tool_args": {
        "runtime": "terminal",
        "session": 1,
        "reset": false,
        "code": "nohup python /a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira_reader.py --filter-id 13811 --view-id 10489904 > /dev/null 2>&1 &\necho \"Jira sync started with PID: $!\""
    }
}

logs.heading: A0: Starting Jira sync monitoring loop

thoughts: The Jira sync script has started in background with PID 7911.
I need to monitor the process by checking the debug log file up to 10 times with 30-second intervals.
First, let me check if the process is still running and what the current state of the log is.
I'll start the monitoring loop now.
kvps.headline: Starting Jira sync monitoring loop

tool_args.code:
echo "=== Initial monitor check ==="
if ps -p 7911 > /dev/null; then
  echo "Process 7911 is running"
else
  echo "Process 7911 has stopped"
fi
echo "\n=== Last 5 lines of jira-debug.log ==="
tail -5 /a0/usr/workdir/jira-debug.log 2>/dev/null || echo "Log file not found yet"

logs.heading: A0: Sending success notification for completed Jira sync
logs.content:
{
    "thoughts": [
        "The Jira sync script completed successfully.",
        "According to the log, it processed 60 unique tickets and finished without errors.",
        "The output file /a0/usr/workdir/jira-output.md exists as expected.",
        "I need to send a success notification with the ticket count (60) to inform the user.",
        "Using the notify-user skill script to send the completion message."
    ],
    "headline": "Sending success notification for completed Jira sync",
    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",
    "tool_args": {
        "runtime": "terminal",
        "session": 3,
        "reset": false,
        "code": "python /a0/usr/skills/notify-user/scripts/notify.py \"✅ Jira sync done: 60 tickets cached. Output: /a0/usr/workdir/jira-output.md\" --title \"Jira Data Sync\""
    }
}
